title: lomatium graveolens var. alpinum
intro: Lomatium graveolens var. alpinum, also known as alpine lomatium or alpine fennel, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of North America, specifically in the western United States and Canada. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of alpine lomatium include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Alpine lomatium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusions, and can be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
